summary: Spanish Baroque painter from Seville. Known for genre scenes of street children (The Young Beggar, Children Eating Grapes and a Melon) and religious paintings including Immaculate Conceptions. 5 tossups, 6 bonuses found.

clues.clue: Painted The Young Beggar and Children Eating Grapes and a Melon — genre scenes of street children
examples: painted The Young Beggar and Children Eating Grapes and a Melon

clues.clue: Created the most widely circulated portrait of the patron saint of the Internet (St. Isidore of Seville)
examples: created the most widely circulated portrait of the patron saint of the Internet
